title: Group looks to AI for water in the Kern River
description: The public interest group Bring Back the Kern launched a competition this week inviting residents to use artificial intelligence to generate images of the Kern River flowing through Bakersfield, where it is mostly dry.

title: Advocacy groups urge YouTube to protect kids from ‘AI slop’ videos
description: Advocacy groups and experts condemned YouTube for serving up low-quality artificial intelligence-generated videos to its most vulnerable audience: children.

title: Oracle Lays Off Thousands to Offset AI Spending
description: Over 500 Oracle workers are being laid off in Kansas City alone.

title: Oracle Lays Off Thousands to Offset AI Spending - Gizmodo
description: Oracle Lays Off Thousands to Offset AI Spending Gizmodo Read the Email Oracle Is Sending to Laid-Off Employees Business Insider Oracle cutting thousands in latest layoff round as company continues to ramp AI spending CNBC Tech giant Oracle makes 'significant' job cuts bbc.com Oracle Layoffs 2026: Manager Shares Emotional Post After 16-Year Career Ends NDTV

title: Headway acquires team behind Tezi to expand AI capabilities in mental health care
description: Headway acquired the team behind AI startup Tezi to automate administrative tasks like insurance verification and scheduling across its 70,000-provider mental health network. Tezi cofounder Raghavendra Prabhu joins as VP of Engineering.
